span.p:
Load Reflexion Insights
from episodic memory
(up to 3 past learnings)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Inject Plan Steps
into system prompt

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Build System Prompt
= Base Prompt
+ Reflexion Context
+ Plan Steps
+ Tool Descriptions

Parse Output:
Thought + Action or Answer

Validate Tool Params
Required fields?
Correct types?

span.p:
Execute Tool via
Tool Service gRPC

Validate Result
Error keys?
Empty results?

(thought, action, observation)

Stage 7: Frame Response
LLM polishes final answer
